dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: THAT'S... CAPTAIN KIDD, FROM SOUTH BLUE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Mister Disco, something amazing came in today.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's a mermaid! A young, female mermaid!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hacchin will send guys like you flying!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Wait, Disco!! She's a valuable auction piece!!!
